examples: The room was painted apricot and white.
The bridesmaids wore apricot and white organza.
The illustration shows a cluster of five roses coloured apricot orange.
"Notes of apricot, " a waiter ventured, which was followed by more earnest proclamations from wine-tasting amateurs.
So they tore out the apricot orchard in their Los Altos Hills, Calif. home and planted grapevines.
